mapper.insert: INSERT INTO instagram_accounts ( member_id, instagram_user_id, username, access_token, token_type, expires_in, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{instagramUserId}, #{username}, #{accessToken}, #{tokenType}, #{expiresIn}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE instagram_user_id = VALUES(instagram_user_id), username = VALUES(username), access_token = VALUES(access_token), token_type = VALUES(token_type), expires_in = VALUES(expires_in), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, instagram_user_id AS instagramUserId, username, access_token AS accessToken, token_type AS tokenType, expires_in AS expiresIn, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM instagram_accounts WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
